title: Learning Getting-Up Policies for Real-World Humanoid Robots
abstract: robust to variations in initial configuration and terrains.We find these innovations enable a real-world G1 humanoid robot to get up from two main situations that we considered: a) lying face up and b) lying face down, both tested on flat, deformable, slippery surfaces and slopes (e.g., sloppy grass and snowfield).
